info.name: StudentGroups
info.description: Endpoints for generating balanced student groups by class.

query.description: When true (default), shape diversity is prioritized over gender diversity. When false, gender diversity takes priority.

variable.description: ID of the class to generate groups for

request.description: Generates balanced groups of 3-4 students for the specified class. Prioritizes shape diversity over gender diversity. Each group will have 1 CIRCLE student when possible. All students must have a shape assigned.

query.description: When false, gender diversity is prioritized over shape diversity.

variable.description: ID of the class to generate groups for

request.description: Generates balanced groups of 3-4 students for the specified class. Prioritizes gender diversity over shape diversity. Each group will have 1 CIRCLE student when possible. All students must have a shape assigned.
